description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a global before_script that runs `yarn` for all jobs. In the default test stage define a `test` job that runs `yarn run-p check:* test:coverage` and a `test:node:10` job that runs `yarn test`. In the deploy stage add a `publish` job that runs only on tags or pipeline triggers, executing the commands `date`, `yarn tsc`, `echo "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}" > .npmrc`, and `npm publish`.
